lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Hi there. So much to see here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yep, could be looking all day!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Updated any displays yet?

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Yes, I just learned more about some priestly warriors and a staff of the gods.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds fun, how did you do that?

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Ahh, I'm big on quests me, love questing. So when I've done one, I check here with 'Historian' Minas to see if I can help the Museum out with some information. Sometimes they already know it, or don't want to know,

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: and sometimes it earns me a reward or two.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds really good. Perhaps I should do the same!

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: You should, as well as everything else there is here in the Museum. Did you know they have a really fun- looking display down in the basement? I love monkeys.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll check it out. Got to get going now, nice talking to you.

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Have a good day!

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Hi there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Oh, just taking a look at these displays. I'm a bit of a history buff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really? Tell me something I didn't know!

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Well, did you know that Bob the Cat is... no, no... you'd never believe me anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He's what? Tell me!

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: No, no. Couldn't possibly ruin the surprise.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ARG! Tell me!

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: If you really want to know, go talk to Unferth in his house in Burthorpe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Oh, hello. I was just looking at this display here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything interesting?

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Yes, one I just updated by talking to 'Historian' Minas. I'm a bit of a quester you see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll let you get on then.

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Hmm, yes. Okay. Don't forget to check out the Natural History exhibit - you could learn a lot.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, bye!

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, have you seen the Dig Site displays?

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Yes, good aren't they! Have you done the quest?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Oh you should, it lets you get into that bit where they clean the finds, and you can join in!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds fun, I should probably check it out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I did it all.

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Did you know after the quest you can get the teddy bear back by stealing it from the female student?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I shall have to try that sometime.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Hmm... 3rd Age.... No, no...maybe 4th...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Yes, that's it, just like that. Mustn't forget the map either....hmm...what else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: HELLO! Are you there?

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Oh, hello there. Sorry, was a bit engrosed in updating this display. I've just been out questing and thought I'd stop off here you see. It's quite rewarding too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, well, no need to ignore me.

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: No offence intended, my dear chap. Just very interested in this history stuff, that's all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay. Have you seen the Natural History exhibit in the basement?

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Oh, yes, marvellous isn't it! I particularly like the wyvern, very interesting considering they've never found a live specimen. And to think they could possibly have been flapping around at one time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A bit like the crazy gnomes and their gliders. Have you seen the model they have upstairs?

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Yes, very intricate isn't it? Worrying to think some people risk their lives in them! You wouldn't catch me up in one. Had a chat with Jacques while I was up there, the art critic...he's a bit funny in the head.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's not very nice!

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: Well, he thinks he's going to get an entire portrait gallery to himself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who knows, the Museum just got really big and appears to have cash. They might entertain him with his very own floor - we'll see.

lines.speaker: Torrcs
lines.text: I guess so. Wonder what poetry he'll come up with then! Still, I must get on with this display. See you around I hope!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!
